# Risk And Compliance Evidence

SMOKE SAMPLE evidence for local verification only. Replace before operational use.

## Period

- Reporting period: 2026-06-17 to 2026-06-23
- Scope: safety walk, training log, engineering defect tracker.

## Safety And Compliance

- Incidents: one minor kitchen slip, no lost time.
- Inspection findings: two fire-door closure checks overdue by 3 days.
- Training gaps: 6 casual F&B team members missing June food safety refresher.
- Required filings or checks: monthly AED visual check due 2026-06-24.

## Maintenance And Asset Risks

- Critical defects: guest elevator 2 had 4 unplanned stops in 7 days.
- Recurring failures: banquet hallway air-conditioning fault repeated twice.
- Guest-facing impact: elevator wait complaints overlap with guest feedback report.

## Mitigation

- Immediate control: assign security patrol to verify fire doors twice daily until checks close.
- Owner: Chief Engineer.
- Deadline: 2026-06-24.

## Evidence Notes

- Source file or system: sample risk register.
- Data owner: Safety Officer.
- Open questions: confirm elevator vendor arrival time.
